subcodes.first_line: O daughter of Aṣdaq! Upon thee be the Most Holy Glory of God! In these days We have made mention of the handmaidens of God in that city, and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بنت اصدق علیک بها الله الاقدس این ایام اماء الله مدینه را ذکر نمودیم و از
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
